summary: Full backend + frontend testing for Le Journal Hippique PMU'B MVP. All 8 backend pytest cases pass. All frontend flows (Course/Partants/Pronostics/Résultats + /horse/[number]) work correctly with proper data, testIDs, search, sorting, and navigation.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' (non-blocking, from RN web internals/deps)

critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown'); consider lifespan context manager (non-blocking).
CORS middleware added after include_router; fine for starlette but convention is before. No functional impact.
Favorites POST returns 200 (upsert). Consider 201 on create vs 200 on update for stricter REST semantics.
seed_data_creation: None. Favorites test data prefixed with TEST_ and cleaned up after test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend .env uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). Use https://data-mobile-hub-2.preview.emergentagent.com as BASE_URL. App is French, mobile-first (390x844). All interactive elements have testIDs: search-horses, sort-number/consensus/gains, horse-row-{n}, horse-back-btn, tab-consensus/experts/classifications. Favorites upsert returns 200 not 201.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found. Verified: GET /api/race (top_picks[0].number=8), /api/horses (16 runners, consensus_appearances<=7), /api/horses/8 (MARINALEDA, expert_mentions>0), /api/horses/999 (404), /api/predictions (7 experts, 16 consensus, 4 classifications), /api/results (Prix de la Gloriette, [4,14,3,9,16]), /api/favorites POST/GET/DELETE happy path + 400 on invalid horse 99, no _id leak. Frontend: home masthead + hero + stats grid (Plat/2400 m/16/50 900 €) + podium with horse 8 first; Partants has 16 rows, search filters to 1 row for 'MARINALEDA', sort-consensus puts 8 first, sort-number puts 1 first; /horse/8 shows MARINALEDA, perf '2.2.3.7.5', 36 472 F CFA, L'analyse commentary, back-btn returns to Partants; Pronostics 3 sub-tabs switch (consensus bars, 7 expert cards, 4 categories Forme/Classe/Progrès/Régularité); Résultats shows Prix de la Gloriette, podium [4,14,3,9,16], NPO 11, fallers 3, payouts with formatted '15 860 000 F CFA'.
